extraction.one_line_summary: O'CONNOR Ben attacked 8km from summit on Madonna di Campiglio final climb, dropped breakaway including dangerous GC threat Pernsteiner.
tactical_patterns: Movistar placed four riders in 19-man breakaway showing numerical saturation strategy on mountain stages.
Sunweb lacked firepower on final climb despite leading GC by 17 seconds, revealing domestique depletion problem.
Pernsteiner attacked solo from breakaway as GC threat 10 minutes down, exploiting different race objectives.
Almeida group refused to chase each other despite minimal GC gaps, signaling mutual deterrence before Stelvio.

rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: attacked with 8km remaining after second place previous day, showing recovery ability on back-to-back mountain stages
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: negative: Sunweb unable to pressure Almeida despite 17-second deficit and running out of mountain stages
rider_signals.PERNSTEINER Hermann: positive: initiated dangerous solo move from breakaway while 10 minutes down GC, positioning for major time gain
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: negative: attacked from GC group but failed, Western Australian unable to replicate compatriot O'Connor's success same day
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: neutral: maintained status quo with GC rivals despite minimal 17-second lead and truce mentality before Stelvio
